text.title: Tool Use — Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: catalog tools → write schemas → dispatcher with validate-execute → safety classification + gating → ship + audit.

step.name: catalog-tools
step.action: Enumerate the ≤20 actions the agent should be able to take. Cluster into read-only / mutating / destructive.
step.output: `tools.yaml` skeleton with name + description per tool
step.decision-gate: If >20 tools — split agent into specialists; one agent with too many tools picks badly.

step.name: write-schemas
step.action: Define JSON Schema per tool. Tighten where possible (enum types, regex for IDs, min/max numerics). Document each arg with `description`.
step.decision-gate: If schema has `additionalProperties: true` — tighten before continuing (r1-typed-schema).

step.name: dispatcher-with-validate-execute
step.action: Build dispatcher: lookup by name, validate args against schema, check safety_class against caller permissions, execute, return result OR error.

step.name: safety-class-and-gating
step.action: For each destructive tool, wire human-approval gate (UI button / Slack approve). Mutating tools rate-limited. Read-only auto-execute.
step.decision-gate: If destructive tool auto-executes — block ship (r4-human-gate-irreversible).

step.name: ship-and-audit
step.action: Wire AuditEntry emission per dispatch. Ship behind feature flag at 5% → 50% → 100%. Monitor tool_choice_accuracy, hallucinated_name_rate, gate_approval_rate.
step.output: Production tool-use live with audit log
step.decision-gate: If hallucinated_name_rate >1% — fix tool descriptions; model is confused.
